data.title: Artifi introduces AI Automated Product Setup, reducing setup time by up to 96%. Launch announced in Milwaukee on Dec. 4, 2025.
data.description: Artifi, a prominent SaaS software provider for essential product customization, has introduced a new feature, AI Automated Product Setup, aimed at streamlining setup processes. Through the utilization of artificial intelligence and computing technology, this innovative addition significantly cuts down setup time by as much as 96%. Launched on December 4, 2025 in Milwaukee, this advancement showcases a substantial leap forward in efficiency and productivity for businesses utilizing the platform.

data.title: Canadian AI solution Scaida BrainCT-ICH, receives FDA clearance, with a high specificity of 0.887 for accurate intracranial hemorrhage triage, aiming to alleviate radiologist burnout.
data.description: A significant development has occurred as the first AI system developed in Canada for triaging intracranial hemorrhage cases has received FDA approval to be introduced in the United States market. This AI technology is designed to automate the process of prioritizing critical cases, potentially easing the burden on radiologists and reducing burnout. With a high level of specificity at 0.887, the system aims to minimize false alarms and enhance workflow efficiency.

data.title: NASB Financial, Inc. declares $0.35 dividend/share, payable on Dec. 26, 2025 to holders of record on Dec. 15, 2025.
data.description: In Kansas City, Missouri, on December 4, 2025, NASB Financial, Inc. (OTCQX: NASB) revealed that its Board of Directors has approved a quarterly cash dividend of $0.35 per share. This dividend will be distributed on December 26, 2025, to shareholders recorded as such on December 15, 2025.

data.title: CFS Brands buys Cornerstone Foodservice Group, expanding their portfolio. Acquisition announced on Dec 4, 2025.
data.description: CFS Brands has recently made a strategic acquisition to enhance its collection of top foodservice equipment and supplies brands. On December 4, 2025, the company confirmed the purchase of Cornerstone Foodservice Group (CFG), a prominent player in the foodservice equipment industry globally. The acquisition will significantly bolster CFS Brands' already impressive portfolio.

data.title: Animoca Brands & crypto communities raise HK$2.6M for Tai Po fire relief, aiding victims through Hong Kong Red Cross.
data.description: Animoca Brands, alongside international cryptocurrency communities, has contributed more than HK$2.6 million to assist those affected by the Tai Po fire in Hong Kong. This donation will aid in supporting recovery endeavors in partnership with the Hong Kong Red Cross.

data.title: Nicholas Merrill launches privacy-first wireless carrier Phreeli, featured in Wired. Aim is to improve privacy with world's first such service.
data.description: In a recent exclusive article by senior writer Andy Greenberg for Wired, the founder and CEO of Phreeli, Nicholas Merrill, discussed the launch of the world's first privacy-focused wireless service. The article emphasized the growing importance of privacy in the telecommunications industry. Merrill highlighted that Phreeli aims to prioritize privacy by design and offers users the ability to sign up with just a zip code. Merrill clarified in the Wired exclusive that Phreeli's intention is not to support illicit activities but to assist individuals in safeguarding their privacy. This move by Phreeli comes at a time when concerns over data security and privacy breaches are on the rise.

data.title: Phoenix Tailings to receive $1.6M from DOE for tech to extract minerals from wastewater, boosting US rare earth supply chain.
data.description: Phoenix Tailings based in Woburn, Massachusetts, has recently been chosen to receive financial support from the U.S. Department of Energy. This funding is intended to assist in strengthening rare earth supply chains within the United States.

data.title: Gen Z poll by LAW and TIPP Insights reveals surprising political attitudes. Reshaping trends in pop culture and politics.
data.description: The League of American Workers, in collaboration with TIPP Insights, has released a pioneering national survey focusing on the perspectives of young Americans. This study comes at a time when Generation Z is significantly influencing various aspects of society, including popular culture and political dynamics. The League of American Workers, spearheaded by a notable political strategist, conducted this survey to delve into the thoughts and opinions of the younger demographic. This survey is anticipated to offer valuable insights into the viewpoints and trends shaping the attitudes of young Americans today. The release of this study in Washington on December 4, 2025, marks a significant milestone in understanding the thoughts and behaviors of the upcoming generation.

data.title: Philips CEO warns of growth target shortfall for 2026, stock drops post-Citi conference. Sales growth unlikely to hit projected 4.5%, facing tariff challenges in 2023.
data.description: Shares of Koninklijke Philips NV (NYSE: PHG ) experienced a substantial decline on Thursday, marking their most significant drop in a single day since February. The stock showed significant weakness following cautious remarks made by CEO Roy Jakobs at Citi's Global Healthcare Conference. According to Reuters, Philips anticipates organic sales growth to increase from 2% this year to 2026, falling short of the 4.5% consensus forecast. As per Citi analysts, the company restated its objective to enhance margins in 2026 but cautioned about tariff headwinds in the upcoming year, which are projected to nearly double. The full story can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Visa (NYSE: V) partners with Syria Central Bank to enable digital economy, expand operations.
data.description: Visa Inc. announced a collaboration with the Central Bank of Syria and local financial authorities to facilitate Syria's inclusion in the global digital economy. The partnership aims to introduce a modern payments infrastructure through a phased approach. Visa's efforts will focus on driving digital financial transformation in Syria, with plans to launch operations in the country. V stock is currently trading within a narrow range, prompting investors to closely monitor its performance for potential opportunities. For more information, refer to the full story on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Finster AI partners with MT Newswires to offer real-time market intel to finance pros as of Dec 4, 2025.
data.description: On December 4, 2025, Finster AI, the AI-native platform designed for banking and investment analysis, revealed a fresh data collaboration with MT Newswires, a top global supplier of real-time financial news across various assets. This alliance enables Finster AI to access MT Newswires' high-quality data, enhancing its capabilities in delivering comprehensive financial insights to its users.

data.title: Survey by Resume.org finds pay, job security top priority for workers in 2026. High importance on compensation, stability, benefits, and career advancement paths for employees. Many dissatisfied with benefits and unclear advancement opportunities.
data.description: In a recent survey conducted in November 2025 by Resume.org, a prominent resume building platform, workers have emphasized the importance of compensation, stability, and work-life balance. Results show that many employees are unhappy with their current benefits and find advancement paths within their organizations to be unclear. The survey highlights that addressing these concerns is crucial, as they impact job satisfaction and retention rates. The study sheds light on the challenges faced by workers in Kirkland, Wash., emphasizing the need for companies to reassess their employee offerings to better meet the needs of their workforce.

data.title: Small-cap stocks hit record highs as investors anticipate Fed rate cut next week. Russell 2000 up 1% at 2,535. Nuclear stocks rally after Nvidia CEO touts nuclear power for AI data centers. Fed cuts projected through 2026, with 90% likelihood of 25-basis-point reduction.
data.description: On Thursday, small-cap stocks in the Russell 2000 index achieved new record highs as investors flocked to the most rate-sensitive sectors in anticipation of an upcoming Federal Reserve rate cut. The market is nearly certain of a third consecutive 25-basis-point reduction next week, with futures indicating an almost 90% likelihood of this move. Forecasts suggest further Fed cuts extending to 2026, with markets already factoring in two extra cuts by June 2023 and assigning close to a 50% chance of a third cut by the end of that year. As of 12:50 p.m. in New York, the Russell 2000 had risen by 1% to reach 2,535, just below its late-October peak of 2,540. Conversely, large-cap stocks like the S&P 500 remained steady, while the Nasdaq 100 and Dow Jones experienced minor declines. Noteworthy was the notable upsurge in nuclear-energy stocks following comments from Nvidia Corp. CEO Jensen Huang, who emphasized the importance of nuclear power in meeting the substantial electricity demands of AI data centers. The VanEck Uranium and Nuclear ETF also saw significant gains. Further details are available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Storable Marine team members Daniel Cohen and Caleb Scillian given 2025 Docks Expo Young Leader Awards for innovation.
data.description: Two individuals from the Storable Marine team were honored for their role in driving innovation and modernizing marine operations. Daniel Cohen, the Enterprise Sales Lead, was recognized for his contributions. Storable Marine, a prominent provider of specialty property management software, made the announcement in Austin, Texas on December 4, 2025. This recognition highlights the team's commitment to advancing marine operations and signifies the company's dedication to progress in the industry.

data.title: REV Group (NYSE: REVG) to report Q4 2025 earnings on Dec 10, 2025, with a live webcast at 10:00 am ET. Details on company website.
data.description: REV Group, Inc. (NYSE: REVG) of Brookfield, Wisconsin, will unveil its Q4 fiscal 2025 financial figures on December 10, 2025, before markets open. An online webcast at 10:00 a.m. ET that day will delve into these results. To participate, visit the REV Group website at www.revgroup.com, navigate to the "Investors" section, and click on "Events." Presentation materials will also be accessible on the site.
